overview.minides: The fourth-generation Continental GT — now with an Ultra Performance Hybrid V8 producing 771 bhp and up to 85 km of silent EV range.
overview.description: The fourth-generation Bentley Continental GT launched globally in 2025, bringing a bold redesign with a wider grille, intense single-lens headlamps, and the signature Bentley Rotating Display — a three-sided unit that switches between a 12.3-inch touchscreen, three analogue dials, or plain open-pore veneer. India offers both the GT coupe and GTC convertible across multiple trims. The lineup is now powered by a 4.0L twin-turbo V8 Ultra Performance Hybrid producing 771 bhp / 1000 Nm combined (GT Speed) — 0-100 km/h in 3.1-3.3 seconds and up to 85 km of pure-electric range — alongside the standard V8 (550 PS) in entry trims. Three-chamber air suspension, active all-wheel drive, and the Bentley Dynamic Ride electronic anti-roll system are standard across the range. Mulliner trims add the floating diamond illuminated grille, 22-inch wheels, and Animated Welcome Lamps.

suspension.additionalTech: Bentley Dynamic Ride (electronic anti-roll); twin-valve adaptive dampers; all-wheel steering (Speed/Mulliner trims)

sharedSpecs.platform: MSB (Modularer Standardantriebsbaukasten — Volkswagen Group MSB Platform)
